name: @ge/okf
description: Standalone OKF (Open Knowledge Format) v0.1 bundle toolkit: slugging, minimal YAML frontmatter emit/parse, concept (Markdown) read/write, link helpers — plus the typed OKF→spec compiler (parse → IR → resolve/variant → emit) under ./compile. The primitive layer stays node-builtins-only and domain-free; the compiler depends only on sibling leaf packages (@ge/std, @ge/agent-spec), never apps/* or tools/*.
